song.title: I Will Not Be Moved
song.lyrics:
INTRO . G#m E B D#m [V1] . G#m E B D#m7 1) I have been a wayward child, I have acted out . G#m E B D#m7 I have questioned Sovereignty, and had my share of doubt . G#m E B D#m And though sometimes my prayers feel like they're bouncing off the sky . G#m E B D#m The hand I hold won't let me go, and is the reason why
[C] Chorus . G#m E I will stumble, I will fall down . B D#m But I will not be moved . G#m E I will make mistakes, I will face heartache . B D#m But I will not be moved . C# E On Christ the Solid Rock I stand, all other ground is sinking sand . F# G#m E B D#m I will not be moved, no, no . {D C#m } { I will not be moved...}
[V2] . G#m E B D#m 2) Bitterness has plagued my heart, many times before . G#m E B D#m My life has been like broken glass, and I have kept the score . G#m E B C# Of all my shattered dreams and though it seemed, that I was far too gone . G#m E B D#m My brokenness helped me to see, it's grace I'm standing on
[B] Bridge . E G#m F# E F# C#m And the chaos in my life, has been a badge I've worn . G#m E And though I have been torn
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
